problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Transcranial. Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
